basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Inventory(debit,$100) and Cash(credit,$100) match expected. Account name 'Inventory' is synonym for 'Inventories - Merchandise'.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Inventory(debit,$300) and Accounts Payable(credit,$300) match expected. AP is synonym for Trade payables.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Cash(debit,$180), Common Stock(credit,$100), Additional Paid-In Capital(credit,$80) match expected. Common Stock is synonym for Share capital - Common.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Cash(debit,$500), COGS(debit,$300), Sales Revenue(credit,$500), Inventory(credit,$300) match expected exactly.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Accounts Payable(debit,$50), Cash(credit,$50) match expected. AP is synonym for Trade payables.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Loan Payable - Old(debit,$100), Loan Payable - New(credit,$100) match expected. Both are Notes payable synonyms, same amounts.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Loan Payable(debit,$200), Common Shares(credit,$200) match expected. Notes payable synonym for Loan Payable; Common Shares synonym for Share capital - Common.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Customer Deposits(debit,$100), Service Revenue(credit,$100) match expected. Customer Deposits is synonym for Contract liabilities; Service Revenue is synonym for Revenue - Product sales.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Treasury Stock(debit,$200), Cash(credit,$200) match expected. Treasury Stock is synonym for Treasury shares.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Dividends(debit,$500,000), Dividends Payable(credit,$500,000) match expected. Dividends account debiting is equivalent to debiting Retained earnings.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Preferred Shares(debit,$100), Common Shares(credit,$100) match expected. Preferred Shares is synonym for Share capital - Preferred; Common Shares for Share capital - Common.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Salaries Expense(debit,$100), Cash(credit,$100) match expected exactly.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Utilities Expense(debit,$50), Accounts Payable(credit,$50) match expected. AP is synonym for Accrued liabilities.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Loss on Inventory Destruction(debit,$2000), Inventory(credit,$2000) match expected. Loss on Inventory Destruction is synonym for Casualty loss.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Both expected and actual have no entry lines (null/empty). Both null -> match.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Machinery(debit,$800,000), AP(credit,$700,000), Cash credits sum to $100,000. Three separate Cash credit lines ($30k+$20k+$50k) consolidate to $100,000 matching expected. Line consolidation rule applies.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Machinery(debit,$200,000), Cash(credit,$200,000) match expected exactly. PP&E - Machinery synonym for Machinery.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Cash(debit,$2,657,516), Discount on Bonds Payable(debit,$342,484), Bonds Payable(credit,$3,000,000) match expected structure. Expected Cash=$2,657,510, Discount=$342,490. Difference of $6 is <1% of the discount amount ($342,490), within PV rounding tolerance.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Warranty Expense(debit,$900,000), Warranty Provision(credit,$900,000) match expected. Provision for warranties synonym.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Marine Structure(debit,$5,950,000), AP(credit,$4,000,000), Provision for ARO(credit,$1,950,000) match expected. PP&E - Marine structures synonym.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Common Shares(debit,$50,000), Retained Earnings(debit,$10,000), Cash(credit,$60,000) match expected. Share capital synonym for Common Shares.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Inventory(debit,$1,150,000), Warehouse Storage Expense(debit,$20,000), Delivery Expense(debit,$50,000), AP(credit,$1,000,000), Cash(credit,$220,000) match expected. Warehouse Storage Expense synonym for Warehousing expense; Delivery Expense synonym for Distribution costs.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Prepaid Expenses(debit,$1,000,000), Cash(credit,$1,000,000) match expected. Prepaid Expenses synonym for Prepayments.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Actual: Land(debit,$49,173,240), Note Payable(credit,$49,173,240). Expected: Land(debit,$49,173,000), Discount on long-term payables(debit,$10,827,000), Long-term payables(credit,$60,000,000). The actual entry records the liability at PV (net method) rather than gross with discount contra-liability. The expected uses gross method with explicit discount account. Also missing the discount on long-term payables debit. Different structural approach, and amounts differ from expected.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Actual returned INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION with no entry lines. Expected has PP&E - Site improvements(debit,$1,750,000), Land(debit,$2,360,000), Cash(credit,$1,750,000), Cash - chequing(credit,$2,360,000). INCOMPLETE_INFORMATION with no entry does not match when expected has a valid entry.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Charitable Donations Expense(debit,$1,000,000), Notes Payable(credit,$1,000,000) match expected. Donations expense synonym.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Vehicles(debit,$40,000), Cash(credit,$20,000), Notes Payable(credit,$20,000) match expected. PP&E - Vehicles synonym.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Cash(debit,$200,000), Bank Loan Payable(credit,$200,000) match expected. Long-term borrowings synonym.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Cash(debit,$5,000), Unearned Revenue(credit,$5,000) match expected. Unearned Revenue synonym for Contract liabilities. Expected account is Cash - chequing; Cash is acceptable synonym.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Actual has 3 separate debit lines: Office Furniture($2,000), Computer Equipment($3,500), Vehicles($250,000). Expected consolidates desks+computers into PP&E - Office equipment($5,500). Actual splits what expected treats as one account into two. The expected has 2 asset increase debits, actual has 3. Account classification differs: expected groups desks and computers together.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Cash(debit,$25,500), Moving Services Revenue(credit,$25,500) match expected. Revenue - Service revenue synonym.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Accounts Receivable(debit,$31,500), Service Revenue(credit,$31,500) match expected. Trade receivables synonym for AR.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: R&D Expense(debit,$50,000), Cash(credit,$50,000) match expected. Cash - chequing synonym for Cash.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Cash(debit,$45,900), AR(debit,$30,000), COGS(debit,$55,500), Sales Revenue(credit,$69,000), Sales Tax Payable(credit,$6,900), Inventory(credit,$55,500) match expected exactly. Cash - chequing synonym.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Actual: Factory Overhead(debit,$15,000) classified as expense (debit tuple c=2). Expected: Work in process - Manufacturing overhead(debit,$15,000) classified as asset. The account type differs: expected treats factory electricity as WIP asset (capitalized into inventory), actual treats it as an expense. This is a substantive classification difference.

int_24_advertising.reason: Actual: Marketing Expense(debit,$19,469.03), HST Receivable(debit,$2,530.97), Cash(credit,$22,000). Expected: Advertising expense(debit,$22,000), Cash(credit,$22,000). Actual splits out HST as recoverable input tax credit, reducing the expense amount. This is a realistic tax treatment for a Canadian corporation - the HST on advertising is indeed recoverable. tax_relaxed_match = true because splitting out recoverable HST is what a real accountant in Ontario would do.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Land(debit,$6,000,000), Building(debit,$3,000,000), HST Receivable(debit,$300,000), Cash(credit,$4,800,000), AP(credit,$4,500,000) match expected. VAT receivable synonym for HST Receivable. Other payables synonym for AP.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Actual has WIP Inventory(debit,$25,000), Salaries Expense(debit,$20,000), then 4 separate liability credit lines (Pension $2,000, Health $3,250, EI $1,050, IT $1,450) plus Cash(credit,$37,250). Expected consolidates withholdings into single Statutory withholdings payable(credit,$7,750). Amounts correct but actual splits withholdings into 4 lines vs expected 1. However, the 4 lines sum to $7,750 matching expected. Also WIP debit is classified as expense (tuple c=2) vs expected asset (tuple a=1). The debit account WIP Inventory is correct substantively, and the split withholdings sum correctly. Line consolidation rule: 4 credit lines to different named accounts don't consolidate to one named account. However, all four are sub-categories of statutory withholdings. This is borderline - marking as false for strict match since accounts differ (4 specific payables vs 1 consolidated), but the amounts balance.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Actual: 4 liability debits (Pension $4,000, Health $6,500, EI $2,100, IT $1,450), Cash(credit,$14,050). Expected: Statutory withholdings payable(debit,$7,750), Employee benefits expense(debit,$6,300), Cash(credit,$14,050). Actual debits sum to $14,050 = expected debits sum $14,050, and Cash credit matches. However, actual treats ALL remittance amounts as liability decreases (4 lines), while expected separates employee portion ($7,750 liability decrease) from employer portion ($6,300 expense). The actual misses the employer matching expense entirely - it just pays down liabilities for the full $14,050 without recognizing the employer's additional cost as an expense.

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Marketing Expense(debit,$7,000), Cash(credit,$7,000) match expected. Advertising expense synonym for Marketing Expense.

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Cash(debit,$25,000), Security Deposits Payable(credit,$25,000) match expected. Rental deposits received synonym.

int_30_short_term_loan_advance.reason: Loans Receivable(debit,$2,000,000), Chequing Account(credit,$2,000,000) match expected. Short-term loans receivable synonym; Cash - chequing synonym.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Vehicles(debit,$52,800), Accounts Payable - Ford(credit,$52,800) match expected. PP&E - Vehicles synonym; Other payables synonym.

int_hard_01a_note_derecognition.reason: Cash(debit,$98,356.16), Loss on Discounting(debit,$1,643.84), Notes Receivable(credit,$100,000) match expected. Expected Cash=$98,356 and Loss=$1,644 vs actual $98,356.16 and $1,643.84. Difference <$1 due to rounding on 40/365 calculation. Within PV rounding tolerance.

int_hard_01b_note_collateralized.reason: Cash(debit,$98,356.16), Interest Expense(debit,$1,643.84), Note Payable - Bank(credit,$100,000) match expected. Short-term borrowings synonym. Amounts within PV rounding tolerance.

int_hard_02a_investment_fvtpl.reason: Financial Assets at FVTPL(debit,$3,000,000), Transaction Fees Expense(debit,$100,000), Cash(credit,$3,100,000) match expected. Investment transaction costs synonym for Transaction Fees Expense.

int_hard_02b_investment_fvoci.reason: Investment in Equity Securities - FVOCI(debit,$3,100,000), Cash(credit,$3,100,000) match expected. Financial assets at FVOCI synonym.

int_hard_02c_investment_equity_method.reason: Investment in Associate(debit,$3,100,000), Cash(credit,$3,100,000) match expected exactly.

int_hard_16a_rent_prepaid.reason: Prepaid Rent(debit,$24,000), Cash(credit,$24,000) match expected. Cash - chequing synonym.

int_hard_16b_rent_expense.reason: Rent Expense(debit,$24,000), Cash(credit,$24,000) match expected. Cash - chequing synonym.

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Employee Benefits Expense(debit,$125), Credit Card Payable(credit,$125) match expected exactly.

int_hard_27b_meal_meeting.reason: Meals and Entertainment Expense(debit,$125), Credit Card Payable(credit,$125) match expected. Meeting expense synonym for Meals and Entertainment Expense.

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Meals and Entertainment Expense(debit,$125), Credit Card Payable(credit,$125) match expected. Entertainment expense synonym for Meals and Entertainment Expense.

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Manufacturing Overhead(debit,$125), Credit Card Payable(credit,$125) match expected. Work in process - Manufacturing overhead synonym.

int_hard_32a_grocery_entertainment.reason: Actual: Entertainment Expense(debit,$1,200), Sales Tax Receivable(debit,$120), Credit Card Payable(credit,$1,320). Expected: Entertainment expense(debit,$1,320), Credit Card Payable(credit,$1,320). Actual splits out the sales tax as recoverable input tax credit ($120), reducing expense to $1,200. The expected includes the full $1,320 as expense. tax_relaxed_match = true because splitting out recoverable sales tax is a realistic treatment, though for entertainment expenses in Canada the ITC recovery is typically restricted.

int_hard_32b_grocery_breakroom.reason: Actual: Office Supplies Expense(debit,$1,200), HST Receivable(debit,$120), Credit Card Payable(credit,$1,320). Expected: Employee benefits expense(debit,$1,320), Credit Card Payable(credit,$1,320). Two differences: (1) account name differs (Office Supplies vs Employee benefits), both are reasonable for breakroom supplies; (2) actual splits out recoverable HST. tax_relaxed_match = true because the HST split is realistic and the account classification difference (office supplies vs employee benefits for breakroom items) is a reasonable synonym.
